analysis.summary: The technician opened Microsoft Outlook and navigated through several emails using the search functionality. They used the 'All Outlook Items' search scope to locate different emails within the mailbox.
actions_taken: Used the search bar within Outlook.
Changed the search scope to 'All Outlook Items' twice.

Viewed emails including 'Fwd: Friday lunch', 'RE: Current Drawing Attached', 'Did You Know?: Discover the Sage 100 Connector for Microsoft 365', and 'QC mentioned you in QC: Receiving Inspection Priority - Open'.
notable_events: Outlook experienced brief periods of blank screen (around 5-6 seconds each) after changing the search scope to 'All Outlook Items', indicating a potential delay in content loading or search processing.
Several Outlook notification pop-ups appeared and disappeared during the session (related to 'Juan Cervantes' and 'QC via Smartsheet').

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked methodically to navigate Outlook and review emails. There were minor pauses during search scope changes where Outlook content was temporarily blank, but the technician proceeded with the task.
